intent.primary_intent: upgrade event dinner styling for a high-end restaurant

recommendations.label: Deep Charcoal Executive Night
recommendations.logic_summary: This is the strongest event option because it feels polished without becoming flashy: a charcoal tailored suit, dark knit base layer, and refined black shoes keep the look upscale but grounded.

pieces.styling_note: Wear open to show the knit layer and avoid a formal tuxedo impression.
Keep the crease clean and the hem full to support the tall frame.
This gives the shirt role without the stiffness and keeps the outfit sophisticated rather than tuxedo-like.
A very dark tie keeps the look event-appropriate without adding drama.
Choose a sleek finish over a heavily brogueed one to preserve event polish.
Keep the overall silhouette restrained and avoid anything casual or heavily branded.

analysis.why_this_works_now: The last user message asks for something different from a high-end event outfit, so the strongest response is a tuxedo-leaning dinner look that feels upscale, restrained, and more in line with his everyday aesthetic than with flashy formalwear.
analysis.persona_alignment: The recommendation stays true to his practical, understated, textured, work-leaning identity while moving into event territory through dark tailoring and subtle refinement rather than contrast or stiffness.
analysis.profile_alignment: It uses his known fit strengths (relaxed straight torso, structured shoulders, hip-length jacket) and his budget range, keeping the styling sophisticated but not over-engineered. The colors and layering also match his existing wardrobe signals so he can integrate the look easily.
analysis.prompt_alignment: The response follows the user request exactly: a high-end restaurant event outfit that is not a tuxedo, not stiff, and not flashy. The strongest version is a deep charcoal tailored suit with a dark knit base layer, silk tie, and polished leather shoes.

scene.setting: intimate upscale restaurant interior with dim warm lighting, polished wood or stone surfaces, and a refined dining table setting
scene.lighting: soft warm ambient interior lighting with subtle table-side accent light, no harsh shadows

pieces.description: charcoal tailored tuxedo jacket worn open over a deep navy fine-gauge crew neck knit, charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal

charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal
deep navy fine-gauge crew neck knit worn as a shirt alternative, soft matte wool blend with fine vertical ribbing, and a clean low-profile collar
black silk tie in a very dark charcoal tone with subtle texture, worn low and straight through the knot
black leather brogues with a sleek low-profile finish and restrained brogue detailing
black leather briefcase with a clean minimalist silhouette and no visible branding

prompt.system: You are a virtual try-on image generator. Produce a single photorealistic fashion image that shows the user wearing the recommended outfit exactly as described. Prioritize realism, accurate garment placement, true-to-life fabric behavior, and the visual intent of a polished event-dinner look. Keep the image editorially subtle and commercially clean, as if it were a personal styling photo taken for a high-end restaurant evening. Avoid cinematic drama, fantasy styling, exaggerated poses, or editorial exaggeration. Use the outfit and style intent only to inform lighting, pose, and mood. Do not add extra clothing, accessories, or accessories beyond what is described. Do not invent a different person. Do not crop the face. Do not make the outfit look formal tuxedo-like; keep it refined and contemporary. Keep the overall silhouette restrained and balanced for a tall man with broad shoulders and a fuller midsection.
prompt.user: Using the photo of the same man as reference, show him in a polished event-dinner outfit for a high-end restaurant. He is tall, with broad shoulders, long arms and legs, and a fuller midsection. The outfit should feel elevated without becoming tuxedo-like: a charcoal tailored tuxedo jacket worn open over a deep navy fine-gauge crew neck knit, charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal charcoal, and black leather brogues. He should look comfortable, confident, and sophisticated in this setting. Render him seated or standing in the restaurant interior, softly illuminated by warm ambient light, with realistic fabric texture, accurate creasing, natural skin detail, and a calm refined expression. The photo should feel candidly styled and photorealistic, as if taken by a professional food-and-style photographer during an evening restaurant event.
